mnemonics: H.O.W.E.V.E.R. - Handling Of WebView Errors Very Effectively Required
keyPoints: However is a keyword used in SwiftUI to conditionally apply modifiers or views.
It is often used with state management to create dynamic and reactive UIs.
It provides a clean way to handle optional state and present views conditionally.
commonMistakes: Confusing 'however' with 'if' or 'switch' statements for view logic.
Forgetting that the view inside 'however' is only rendered when the condition is true.
Overusing 'however' instead of structuring the view hierarchy more efficiently.
